summary: The test suite is essentially non-existent. The only file provided is a thin Python wrapper (run_tests.py) that shells out to a PowerShell script (Run-Tests.ps1) which itself is not provided. There are zero Pester test cases, no test fixtures, no mocks, and no assertions of any kind. None of the specified requirements — manifest parsing, dependency extraction, allow/deny list checking, compliance report generation, error handling, or strict mode compliance — are exercised. The implementation code is also empty, confirming no TDD cycle was followed at all. This test suite would catch no regressions and provides no confidence whatsoever.
